headline: SCHX’s 750 stocks hide a 48% concentration risk most dividend investors overlook
summary: The Schwab U.S. Large-Cap ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHX) charges 0.03% a year, holds 750 stocks, and just paid a quarterly distribution of $0.0732 per share on March 30, 2026. For roughly thirty cents a year on every $1,000 invested, SCHX investors get exposure to almost the entire U.S. large-cap market, with income that has arrived on schedule ...
